data.author: cjamin
data.message:
Bug fix: this call to `anyabs` should not be here

Example: if `maxAngle = 0.2`, an angle of 3.1 radians should obviously be reject. But with the current code, `eps = cos (0.2)` ~= 0.98, and `abs(cos(3.1)` ~= 0.999, so it is accepted. With this fix, `cos(3.1` ~= -0.999, it is rejected.

data.author: jsburklund
data.message:
Fix/normal space hashing (#327)

* Add assertion checks for debugging

* Fix hashing issues.

Explicity use the correct rounding direction so that enough
buckets are allocated, and handle wrapping theta appropriately
at Pi. Previously, if theta=Pi, the hash returned an index out
of bounds of the preallocated memory and caused a segfault.

data.author: Ellon
data.message:
[error minimizer] Add getResidualError methods

getResidualError is a const method and makes use of getMatchedPoints, thus we
also add a const version of getMatchedPoints that does not change
ErrorMinimizer's lastErrorElements.

The residual error is computed in a separated function defined in an anonymous
namespace

data.author: c42f
data.message:
Make nested boost::assign::map_list_of work in C++11 mode

Adding a layer of indirection here seems necessary to avoid ambiguities
introduced by new C++11 features.  The extra layer forces a call to the
implicit conversion operator defined for converting the boost
initialization list format to std::map.
